requirement_topic.en: UZRTC Radio Type Approval and Frequency Permit — Uzbekistan Telecom and Radio Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: UZRTC无线电型号核准及频率许可——乌兹别克斯坦电信及无线电设备
requirement_topic.zht: UZRTC無線電型號核准及頻率許可——烏茲別克電信及無線電設備

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment placed on the Uzbekistan market must obtain type approval and a frequency permit from UZRTC (Uzbekistan Agency for Radio Frequencies and Television/Radio Broadcasting — O'zbekiston Respublikasi Radio Chastotalari va Teleko'rsatuv-Eshittirish Agentligi). UZRTC manages radio spectrum allocation and issues frequency assignment permits required before radio equipment may be imported or operated. Wi-Fi at 2.4 GHz is generally permitted for licence-exempt use; 5 GHz Wi-Fi requires a UZRTC frequency permit. Bluetooth, Zigbee, Z-Wave, cellular (3G/4G/5G), and all other radio-frequency devices are within scope. Type approval requires submission of technical documentation and test reports from accredited laboratories. An approval certificate or registration number is issued by UZRTC and must be in place before import and commercial sale. Uzbekistan is not a member of the EAEU — Russian EAC marking is not applicable and does not substitute for UZRTC approval.
summary.zh: 所有投放乌兹别克斯坦市场的无线电及电信终端设备，须取得UZRTC（乌兹别克斯坦无线电频率及电视广播机构）的型号核准及频率许可。UZRTC负责无线电频谱管理，并就无线电设备的进口或使用颁发频率分配许可。2.4GHz Wi-Fi通常为免许可使用；5GHz Wi-Fi须取得UZRTC频率许可。蓝牙、Zigbee、Z-Wave、蜂窝（3G/4G/5G）及所有其他射频设备均在适用范围内。型号核准须提交技术文件及认可实验室出具的测试报告，经核准后由UZRTC颁发核准证书或注册号码。产品须在进口并商业销售前完成上述核准。乌兹别克斯坦非EAEU成员，俄罗斯EAC标志不适用，不可替代UZRTC核准。
summary.zht: 所有投放烏茲別克市場的無線電及電信終端設備，須取得UZRTC（烏茲別克無線電頻率及電視廣播機構）的型號核准及頻率許可。UZRTC負責無線電頻譜管理，並就無線電設備的進口或使用頒發頻率分配許可。2.4GHz Wi-Fi通常為免許可使用；5GHz Wi-Fi須取得UZRTC頻率許可。藍牙、Zigbee、Z-Wave、蜂窩（3G/4G/5G）及所有其他射頻設備均在適用範圍內。型號核准須提交技術文件及認可實驗室出具的測試報告，經核准後由UZRTC頒發核准證書或註冊號碼。產品須在進口並商業銷售前完成上述核准。烏茲別克非EAEU成員，俄羅斯EAC標誌不適用，不可替代UZRTC核准。

standards_or_laws: Law of the Republic of Uzbekistan 'On Telecommunications' — establishes mandatory type approval for telecom terminal and radio equipment
Law of the Republic of Uzbekistan 'On Radio Frequency Spectrum' — governs spectrum allocation and frequency permit requirements
UZRTC (O'zbekiston Respublikasi Radio Chastotalari va Teleko'rsatuv-Eshittirish Agentligi) — regulatory authority for radio frequency type approval and frequency permits in Uzbekistan
O'z DSt standards series — Uzbek state standards for radio and telecommunications equipment

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices are subject to SRRC (State Radio Regulatory Commission of China) radio type approval for radio transmission modules and equipment, administered under MIIT. Devices using Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and other radio frequencies must obtain an SRRC approval number before sale in China. Terminal equipment (routers, modems, cellular devices) additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). Chinese SRRC approval and NAL are not recognised by UZRTC and do not substitute for Uzbekistan type approval. Test data generated to Chinese standards (GB 15629.11 for Wi-Fi, YD/T series for cellular) are not accepted by UZRTC; full re-evaluation by an UZRTC-accredited laboratory is required.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC，工业和信息化部下属）的无线电型号核准，适用于无线电发射模块及设备。使用Wi-Fi、蓝牙及其他射频的设备须在中国销售前取得SRRC核准号。终端设备（路由器、调制解调器、蜂窝设备）还须额外取得工业和信息化部网络接入许可证（NAL）。中国SRRC核准和NAL不被UZRTC承认，不可替代乌兹别克斯坦型号核准。依据中国标准（Wi-Fi适用GB 15629.11，蜂窝适用YD/T系列）产生的测试数据不被UZRTC接受；须由UZRTC认可实验室重新评估。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC，工業和信息化部下屬）的無線電型號核准，適用於無線電發射模組及設備。使用Wi-Fi、藍牙及其他射頻的設備須在中國銷售前取得SRRC核准號。終端設備（路由器、調製解調器、蜂窩設備）還須額外取得工業和信息化部網絡接入許可證（NAL）。中國SRRC核准和NAL不被UZRTC承認，不可替代烏茲別克型號核准。依據中國標準（Wi-Fi適用GB 15629.11，蜂窩適用YD/T系列）產生的測試數據不被UZRTC接受；須由UZRTC認可實驗室重新評估。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — State Radio Regulatory Commission of China (MIIT), mandatory for radio transmission equipment sold in China
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, mandatory for telecom terminal equipment sold in China
GB 15629.11 — Information technology — Telecommunications and information exchange between systems — WLAN (Wi-Fi)
YD/T series — Chinese telecom industry standards for cellular terminal equipment

gap.en: Chinese SRRC approval and MIIT NAL are not recognised by UZRTC and cannot be used as substitutes for Uzbekistan radio type approval. A separate UZRTC type approval application must be filed, supported by test reports from an UZRTC-accredited laboratory. 5 GHz Wi-Fi requires an additional UZRTC frequency permit even after type approval. Products imported or sold in Uzbekistan without valid UZRTC type approval and frequency permit are subject to confiscation, market withdrawal, and administrative penalties. The strong Belt and Road trade corridor between China and Uzbekistan increases customs scrutiny for non-compliant radio devices. Timeline for UZRTC type approval varies but typically takes 2–4 months.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC核准和工业和信息化部NAL不被UZRTC承认，不可替代乌兹别克斯坦无线电型号核准。须单独提交UZRTC型号核准申请，并附上UZRTC认可实验室出具的测试报告。5GHz Wi-Fi在取得型号核准后仍须另行申请UZRTC频率许可。未取得有效UZRTC型号核准及频率许可而在乌兹别克斯坦进口或销售的产品，将面临没收、市场下架及行政处罚。中国与乌兹别克斯坦之间强劲的"一带一路"贸易走廊使海关对不合规无线设备的审查更为严格。UZRTC型号核准所需时间通常为2至4个月。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC核准和工業和信息化部NAL不被UZRTC承認，不可替代烏茲別克無線電型號核准。須單獨提交UZRTC型號核准申請，並附上UZRTC認可實驗室出具的測試報告。5GHz Wi-Fi在取得型號核准後仍須另行申請UZRTC頻率許可。未取得有效UZRTC型號核准及頻率許可而在烏茲別克進口或銷售的產品，將面臨沒收、市場下架及行政處罰。中國與烏茲別克之間強勁的「一帶一路」貿易走廊使海關對不合規無線設備的審查更為嚴格。UZRTC型號核准所需時間通常為2至4個月。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UZRTC radio type approval and frequency permit required for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before import and sale in Uzbekistan; 5 GHz Wi-Fi requires additional frequency permit
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval (and MIIT NAL for terminal equipment) required before sale in China

source.publisher: UZRTC — Uzbekistan Agency for Radio Frequencies and Television/Radio Broadcasting

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UZRTC radio type approval and frequency permit are mandatory for all Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT radio devices sold in Uzbekistan. Chinese SRRC approval does not substitute. A dedicated UZRTC application with accredited test reports is required. 5 GHz Wi-Fi needs a separate frequency permit. Uzbekistan is not in the EAEU — the EAC mark does not apply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UZRTC无线电型号核准及频率许可对所有在乌兹别克斯坦销售的Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及物联网无线设备为强制要求。中国SRRC核准不可替代。须提交附有认可测试报告的专项UZRTC申请。5GHz Wi-Fi须另行申请频率许可。乌兹别克斯坦非EAEU成员，EAC标志不适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UZRTC無線電型號核准及頻率許可對所有在烏茲別克銷售的Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及物聯網無線設備為強制要求。中國SRRC核准不可替代。須提交附有認可測試報告的專項UZRTC申請。5GHz Wi-Fi須另行申請頻率許可。烏茲別克非EAEU成員，EAC標誌不適用。
